design_rationale: Authored sibling file out_of_sample_driver.py via mechanical substitution from in_sample_driver.py. Preserves IS driver byte-stable on disk (P3 BUILD sha unchanged), which keeps the chain-of-custody guards across all prior phases clean. Each driver is single-purpose and the diff is fully auditable in git.

substitutions_applied.new: """s10 D2 out-of-sample driver -- local Databento DBN decoder + Donchian backtest (P10 OOS gate).
substitutions_applied.old: """s10 D2 in-sample driver -- local Databento DBN decoder + Donchian backtest.

substitutions_applied.new: of `run_out_of_sample()` requires a separate operator authorization (P10).
substitutions_applied.old: of `run_in_sample()` requires a separate operator authorization (P6.5).

substitutions_applied.new: # Hard runtime checks (called by run_out_of_sample BEFORE any DBN decode)
substitutions_applied.old: # Hard runtime checks (called by run_in_sample BEFORE any DBN decode)

substitutions_applied.new: Window filter: bars whose ET timestamp date in [OUT_OF_SAMPLE_START, OUT_OF_SAMPLE_END]
substitutions_applied.old: Window filter: bars whose ET timestamp date in [IN_SAMPLE_START, IN_SAMPLE_END]

substitutions_applied.new: sizing on NQ + GC + ZN + CL across the out-of-sample window, applies the
substitutions_applied.old: sizing on NQ + GC + ZN + CL across the in-sample window, applies the

substitutions_applied.new: print("s10 D2 NO-PYRAMID out_of_sample_driver is BUILD-only scaffolding at P3.6.")
substitutions_applied.old: print("s10 D2 NO-PYRAMID in_sample_driver is BUILD-only scaffolding at P3.")

substitutions_applied.new: print("This script will now exit WITHOUT calling run_out_of_sample().")
substitutions_applied.old: print("This script will now exit WITHOUT calling run_in_sample().")

report_kind: S10-D2 P3.6 BUILD-EXTENSION: native OOS driver support
seal_method: LESSON_HUNTER_004 canonical roundtrip (json.dumps sort_keys=True separators=',:' ensure_ascii=False default=str EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method)
strategy_parameters_changed_from_is_driv: NONE — strategy parameters live in runner_main.CONFIG which is shared by both drivers. Donchian 55/20, Wilder ATR(20), 2N stop, 1% risk, max_units=1, AMB6 NONE, no-pyramid invariant, starting_cash=$500,000, S0..S4 cost tiers — ALL UNCHANGED.
